label: Daily Flap Rename
info:
Renames your SurePetcare cat flap every day with a randomly chosen dramatic name, so you get messages like 'Minoes left through the Gates of Valhalla'.

## Setup
1. Configure the surepetcare-config node with your credentials
2. Set the Device ID in the surepetcare-control node (numeric ID from GET /device)
3. Deploy and click the inject node's button to test it immediately
4. The flow fires automatically every day at 00:01

## Notes
- All names are phrased to read naturally in '$cat left through $name'
- If you have multiple flaps, adjust the Device ID in the control node to target a specific one

name: Pick Today's Name
func:
const names = [
    // Mythological & Epic
    'the Gates of Valhalla',
    'the Bifrost',
    'the Portal of Olympus',
    'the Elysian Gateway',
    'Styx Crossing',
    "the Oracle's Pass",
    "Hades' Threshold",
    'the Asgardian Portal',
    "Schrödinger's Portal",

    // Sci-Fi
    'Wormhole Alpha-7',
    'the Transporter',
    'Stargate One',
    'the Event Horizon',
    'Hyperspace Junction',
    'the TARDIS',
    'the Death Star Exhaust Port',
    'the Holodeck Exit',

    // Fantasy & Literature
    'Platform 9¾',
    'the Wardrobe to Narnia',
    'the Black Gate of Mordor',
    'the Mines of Moria',
    'Rivendell Gateway',
    "Bag End's Back Door",
    "the Shire's Secret Exit",

    // TV & Pop Culture
    'the Twilight Zone',
    'the Upside Down',
    'the Phantom Zone',
    'the Sunken Place',
    'the Matrix Exit',
    'the Westworld Gate',
    "Jumanji's Portal",

    // Dramatic & Theatrical
    'the Grand Theatre of Departure',
    'the Eternal Threshold',
    'the Portal of Destiny',
    'the Gateway to the Great Beyond',
    'the Threshold of Eternity',
    'the Majestic Passage',

    // Silly & Punny
    'the Paw-tal',
    'the Meow-trix',
    'the Feline Gateway',
    'Whisker Warp',
    'the Purr-tal Dimension',
    'the Claws & Effect Portal',
    'the Fur-bidden Zone',
    'the Cat-acomb Entrance',
    'the Hiss-toric Gateway',
    'Nine Lives Threshold',
    'the Pounce Point',

    // Historical
    'the Thermopylae Pass',
    "Hadrian's Cat Door",
    'the Agincourt Gate',
    "Brandenburg's Cat Portal",

    // Cosmic
    'the Black Hole',
    'the Nebula Gate',
    'Andromeda Crossing',
    'the Cosmic Radiation Zone'
];

msg.payload = { name: names[Math.floor(Math.random() * names.length)] };
return msg;
